top_signals.title: Bloomberg Surveillance 7/2/2026
top_signals.summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swire Shipping Announces New Branch Office in Timor-Leste
top_signals.summary: Swire Shipping announced the establishment of a new branch office in Dili, Timor-Leste, marking a milestone in the company's investment in Southeast Asia.The new office will be led by Darry Tan, who has spent the past two years on the ground…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: House lawmakers approved a bipartisan bill to protect older adults from financial fraud. Here's what to know
top_signals.summary: The Financial Exploitation Prevention Act of 2025 is aimed at preventing adults age 65 or older or those with disabilities from losing their money to fraud.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DOJ Probes Alleged Insider Trading Scheme That Stung Susquehanna
top_signals.summary: The Justice Department is looking into Susquehanna International Group’s allegations that unknown insider traders made $100 million on options bets placed ahead of a recent Chinese regulatory crackdown on cross-border brokerages, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: EG Group’s Gas-Station Firm Cumberland Farms Files for US IPO
top_signals.summary: Cumberland Farms Ltd, the gas station and convenience store operator, filed for a US initial public offering, joining a rush of debuts that’s powered a record start to the year.

top_signals.title: Joint press release: €2.5 billion of EU ETS revenues invested in cleaner energy systems in 11 EU countries
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 02 Jul 2026 The European Commission and the European Investment Bank have announced today the disbursement of €2.5 billion from the Modernisation Fund to support 51 energy-related projects in 11 EU Member States.

top_signals.title: SILICON Publishes Whitepaper on Maritime Welding Shortage
top_signals.summary: SILICON has published a whitepaper, "Rapid Arc Welding: Solving the Maritime Welder Shortage," which explores how automation and digital welding technologies can help shipyards reduce their dependence on scarce skilled labour while increasing…
